title: JJDA-008 Rubbing instead of a snack ... Mary Tachibana
description: A chaste boyne wife who lives in a rental apartment with her husband who works in the field as one master of daily salary and monthly salary. One day, her husband, who is the main pillar of the family, injured his leg while working on site, and he was chased further from the place where he was originally stubborn, and his household was in distress. I wondered if I could give up the payment of "Oyachin" at the end of the month for a while. My wife's omne ... ".
